series_metadata.series_title: Sexual Assault Kit Tracking System Notifications
series_metadata.series_description: Notification messages sent to users who have updated the chain-of-custody of sexual assault forensic evidence kits in the sexual assault kit tracking system. Automated message confirms that their informational update as been made to the system, such as change in storage location and transfer date information if applicable.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 30 days from notification being sent., Electronic: Delete
